opportunity.name: Acme Renewal
opportunity.description: Customer is evaluating us vs Salesforce (SFDC). Pricing was higher than expected.

engagements.subject: Internal note
engagements.content: They also liked Zendesk, but said SFDC is the incumbent. Asked for discount.

engagements.subject: Re: pricing
engagements.content: Salesforce is ~20% cheaper per seat. Can you match?
